notes: 10x8 matrix — AI workflow adoption in SG SMEs is still forming, so segmentation spans how much AI/digital maturity they already have. Needs axis leans commercial (price, grant-eligibility) plus local (SG integrations).

us_scores_rationale.Price accessibility: Under S$500/mo entry — vs S$5K/mo floor for SIs and free-but-hidden-cost for Zapier
us_scores_rationale.SG localisation: Xero SG, PayNow, IRAS GST, MOM WP, PDPA ready — not a US-first tool with SG workarounds
us_scores_rationale.Pre-built workflows: 9 ready-made workflows ship day one (not 'build-your-own' like Zapier)
us_scores_rationale.Deployment speed: Live in 48 hours — not 6-8 weeks for SIs, not months for Big 4
us_scores_rationale.PSG / grant eligibility: PSG pre-approved track, 50% subsidy. Zapier/Make/global vendors are not PSG-eligible
us_scores_rationale.Founder-led support: 30-min free diagnostic + founder-led setup. SIs assign juniors; global vendors give chatbot
us_scores_rationale.WhatsApp native: WhatsApp Business API native in 5 of 9 workflows; core sales channel in SG
us_scores_rationale.Xero / SG accounting native: 3 workflows plug Xero SG directly; Zapier requires middleware

segments.label: Solo operator (1 person biz)
segments.note: Freelancers, consultants, creators — currently hand-prompting ChatGPT

segments.label: Micro B2C stuck in WhatsApp chaos
segments.note: F&B / retail / services 5-20 employees, WhatsApp + Xero, 0 automation

segments.label: Sales-heavy SME (RE, insurance, recruitment)
segments.note: Lead-volume-driven, needs WhatsApp AI + CRM automation

segments.label: Ops-heavy SME (logistics, construction)
segments.note: Operations throughput problem — docs, dispatch, scheduling

segments.label: Gen-2 family business modernising
segments.note: 20+ year SME, younger gen taking over, first AI investment

segments.label: Funded startup automating for scale
segments.note: Seed/Series-A with 10-40 headcount, burn-clock, ops cost control

segments.label: Healthcare clinic chain
segments.note: Multi-branch clinic ops: bookings, pre-consult forms, follow-ups

segments.label: NGO / social enterprise (grant-funded)
segments.note: Programme-funded, must justify every dollar, PSG + IMDA strand usage
